title: Response Status, Success Variants, Failure Taxonomy, and Problem Details · Browser and Nod… · Contract Lens: Partial And Ambiguous Outcomes
summary: A support SDK receives 202, 204, redirects, problem details, opaque browser failures, and incompatible success payloads. Planned artifact: Add and verify the http ts partial and ambiguous outcomes increment in a TypeScript 7 standards-based Fetch typed response and failure classifier. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Represent partial results and unknown write outcomes so callers do not silently retry or declare success. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.

Parse RFC 9457 problem details by type and extensions without scraping human-readable title or detail text. Demonstrate the result through TypeScript 7 strict types plus WHATWG Fetch Request, Response, Headers, URL, streams, and AbortSignal contracts.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
